bugs.report_text: The header is hidden behind other page content instead of appearing on top.
bugs.neg_code: <header className="border-b bg-white sticky top-0 z-50 shadow-sm">

bugs.report_text: The logo background is displaying as a solid dark color instead of the intended gradient.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-purple-600 flex items-center justify-center">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center">

bugs.report_text: The logo text is not visible against its background due to poor contrast.
The filter buttons are overflowing the container horizontally instead of wrapping to multiple lines.
The active filter button is not displaying the correct background styling.
The overlay is permanently blocking interaction with the product card instead of being dismissible.
bugs.neg_code: <article className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-white shadow-sm ring-1 ring-slate-100 transition duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg"><div className={`relative flex h-48 items-center justify-center ${product.color} overflow-hidden`}>
bugs.pos_code: <article className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-white shadow-sm ring-1 ring-slate-100 transition duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg"><div className="absolute inset-0 z-50 bg-black/70 opacity-70 pointer-events-auto" /><div className={`relative flex h-48 items-center justify-center ${product.color} overflow-hidden`}>

bugs.report_text: The product title is positioned abnormally with excessive negative spacing that collapses the layout.
The hero section content is cramped into too many columns with insufficient spacing between elements.
The badge element is positioned outside its intended container due to excessive negative spacing.
bugs.neg_code: <span className="inline-block px-4 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/20 text-sm font-semibold mb-4">
bugs.pos_code: <span className="inline-block px-4 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/20 text-sm font-semibold mb-4 -my-20 -ml-12">

bugs.report_text: The footer description text is too bold and dark, creating poor visual hierarchy and readability.
bugs.neg_code: Your trusted source for premium tech equipment and accessories.
bugs.pos_code: Your trusted source for premium tech equipment and accessories.
